description: Search queries for paper corpus acquisition per causal pathway. Queries are designed to maximise coverage across India's diversity of aquifer types (ACWADAM), agro-ecological regions (NBSS-LUP AER 1-20), rainfall regimes, and terrain types. Each pathway has a base set of general India queries plus context-specific variants.
